topic: My closet door is open one inch wider every single morning.
title: The Closet Door Opens An Inch | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: Every morning my closet door stood one inch wider open.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a closet door ajar by a narrow gap, darkness inside, dim bedroom light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: My bedroom is small, the closet right beside my bed.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a tidy small bedroom with a tall closet beside the headboard, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I close that door fully every night. Always.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a hand pressing a closet door shut, soft lamp glow, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At first the gap was thin, easy to ignore.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a closet door with a hairline gap, faint shadow line, dim morning light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I started measuring it with a strip of tape.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a strip of masking tape marking a closet door edge, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One inch wider. Every single morning. Never less.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a tape measure held against the gap of an open closet door, dim room, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I wedged a chair against it before I slept.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a wooden chair tilted against a closet door, dim bedroom at night, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By morning the chair sat aside, the door wider still.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a chair moved away from a closet now standing open, deep shadow inside, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Counting backward, in twenty nights it would stand fully open.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a closet door open halfway, total blackness within, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: On the last night, I stayed awake and watched.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a watchful silhouette of bedding facing a dark closet, faint moonlight, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At dawn the door was shut, and I had not slept.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a fully closed closet door in grey morning light, quiet bedroom, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But my chair now sat inside, facing the bed.
scenes.image_prompt: still photograph of a single chair placed inside an open closet facing outward, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
